button.label: AFK / Pause
button.atTableHint: Not available while you're seated at a table.

overlay.title: Paused
overlay.body: You're marked as away. Tables and the lobby chat are paused — direct messages still reach you.

appTagline: The open-source Jass in the Vorarlberg tradition.

toasts.requestApproved: Your request was accepted. <link>Go to table</link>

edit.title: Edit profile
edit.intro: All fields are optional. Use the dropdown next to each field to control who can see it.
edit.namesHint: {{firstName}}, {{lastName}} & co. are all optional — change your player name ({{name}}) and e-mail ({{email}}) via account management.
edit.statsVisibilityQuestion: Who may see your game statistics (matches, wins, win rate, avg points per variant) on your profile?
edit.dmPolicyQuestion: Who may send you direct messages?
edit.presenceQuestion: Who can see your online status (online / last seen)?
edit.leaderboardOptIn: Appear on the <link>public leaderboard</link> (opt-in). Only your nickname and aggregated record stay visible; one click opts you back out.

completePrompt.title: Complete your profile?
completePrompt.body: You can optionally add your first and last name — others only see it if you allow it in your visibility settings.

history.title: Past games
history.empty: You haven't played a game yet. Visit the lobby to open or join a table.

push.unsupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
push.notConfigured: The server has not configured VAPID keys yet — push is currently disabled.
push.intro: Get a browser push when someone wants to join your table (even when your tab is closed). Per browser/device — the setting is not account-wide.
push.errorNotConfigured: Push is not configured on the server.

friends.noFriendsHint: No friends yet. In a game, click a fellow player's name → “Request friendship”.
friends.emptyHint: You have no friends or pending requests yet. In a game, click a fellow player's name → “Request friendship”.

conversations.empty: No private messages exchanged yet. Once you message someone, conversations show up here.
conversations.selectHint: Pick a person on the left to see the history.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.intro: Here you see all devices/browsers where your account is signed in. If you suspect unauthorized access: “Sign out all others” immediately ends all other sessions.

data.exportIntro: You can download all data we have stored about you as a JSON file — profile, games, chat messages, friendships, sessions (anonymized), audit-log entries.
data.deleteIntro: On deletion, all personal fields (name, e-mail, profile content, avatar, friendships) are anonymized. Your past games stay visible to fellow players in their history, but your player name is replaced everywhere with anon-…. This action cannot be undone.

stats.empty: No finished matches yet. Once you play a game to the end, your record appears here.
stats.title: Statistics

publicProfile.noPublicFields: This profile has no publicly visible fields.

auth.captchaPending: Please complete the captcha before continuing.

register.title: Create an account
register.intro: Register with a player name and a password. You will receive a confirmation e-mail.
register.existingEmailHint: If your e-mail is already registered, we won't send a second verification mail (anti-enumeration). Check your inbox (incl. spam) for the original — or use Forgot password to get back in.
register.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.

login.title: Sign in
login.redirectHint: After sign-in we'll send you back to {{target}}.

checkEmail.title: Please confirm your e-mail
checkEmail.intro: We've sent you a link. Click it to start playing.
checkEmail.introWithAddress: We've sent a link to {{email}}. Click it to start playing.
checkEmail.validity: The link is valid for 24 hours. Check the spam folder if needed.
checkEmail.adminIntro: Your account has been created. An admin must approve it before you can sign in.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.intro: Enter your e-mail address — we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that e-mail is registered, the link is on its way.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.success: Password changed. You can sign in now.
reset.invalidToken: Reset link is expired or invalid. Please request a new one.

sessionSuperseded.title: Session ended
sessionSuperseded.defaultReason: This connection was replaced by another one.

home.verified: E-mail confirmed. You can sign in now.
home.body: Play Vorarlberger Kreuz-Jass against real people or AI opponents — on your own server, ad-free, tracker-free.

setup.title: Welcome!
setup.intro: So your fellow players know who you are, we need your first and last name once. By default only signed-in players see it, not the open internet — you can change that anytime in your profile.
setup.missingNames: Please enter your first and last name.

leaderboard.title: Leaderboard
leaderboard.intro: Global ranking — sorted by win rate (min. 5 matches). You only appear if you've enabled the opt-in in your profile.
leaderboard.empty: No players have opted into the leaderboard for this variant yet.

consent.text: We only set technically necessary cookies — for your login and to remember this notice. No tracking, no ads, no third-party analytics. Details: Privacy.

lobby.title: Lobby
lobby.empty: No open tables. Open the first one with “Open table” up top.

onlineUsers.heading: Online now
onlineUsers.none: No one but you is online.

leave.inGameIntro: The game is currently in progress. If you bail out now, an AI takes over your seat and the game continues without you — your fellow players won't be interrupted.
leave.inGameWarning: Keep in mind: if real players are at the table, quitters spoil the fun for them. This is also recorded in the audit log.
leave.inGameAlternative: Alternative: just navigate away for a moment — you'll find the table again under “Your active table” in the lobby.
leave.waitingIntro: You're giving up your seat. If you're the owner, the table is closed once the last human leaves.

dissolve.confirmBody: The table will be closed for everyone and disappear from the lobby. This cannot be undone.

openTable.title: Open a new table
openTable.subtitle: Set the join rules, opponents and target score.

solo.headingMulti: 🎯 Start solo against 3 AI right away
solo.headingSingle: 🎯 Start solo against the AI right away
solo.hint: Click and go — the table is private, free seats are filled with the chosen AI.

announceLevel.slalomHint: Mode alternates between Top-down and Bottom-up each trick — requires Oben/Unten.

scoringRules.weisNeedsTrickHint: A team/player who wins no trick in a round loses their declaration (Weis) points.
scoringRules.sackHint: Under 21 card points in a round, everything is voided — including the Weis. The points go to nobody.
scoringRules.cutHint: Before each deal (except the first), the player to the dealer's right actually cuts the deck — or knocks.

KREUZ_4P.title: Kreuz-Jass (four players)
KREUZ_4P.hint: Classic: 2 teams (seats 1+3 vs 2+4), passing (to partner) allowed. Target 1000.

SOLO_4P.title: Solo Jass (four players)
SOLO_4P.hint: Everyone for themselves — no partner, no passing. Target 500.

BODENSEE_2P.title: Bodensee Jass
BODENSEE_2P.hint: Two players, a table stack of face-down cards. Target 500.

OPEN.title: Open
OPEN.hint: Anyone can join — seats fill up on their own.

REQUEST.title: By request
REQUEST.hint: Players join only after your approval.

INVITE.title: Invite only
INVITE.hint: Only your friends can see the table.

heuristic.title: Heuristic
heuristic.hint: Fast, solid default AI — the default for most tables.

nn.title: Neural network
nn.hint: Strongest opponent; needs the inference microservice.

random.title: Random
random.hint: Plays only legal cards at random — for practice or tests.

openTable.autoFillHintOff: Seats stay open until players join.
openTable.autoFillHint: After {{seconds}}s with no further join, open seats are filled automatically by AI.
openTable.targetScoreHint: Vorarlberg standard: 1000 or 1200. The first team over the target wins.

SIEGER_GIBT.title: Winner deals
SIEGER_GIBT.hint: Classic: whoever won the last game deals the next.

WELI.title: Play for the WELI
WELI.hint: Deal out the cards — whoever holds the WELI starts the next game.

tableDetail.heading: {{name}}'s table
tableDetail.gameRunningNotAtTable: Game in progress — but you're not seated at the table.

announceOverlay.gumpfSub: ({{suit}} is trump — the rest follows Bottom-up (Geiss))

game.finished: Round over — match standing is shown above.

announce.title: You have to announce.
announce.pushedToYou: {{name}} passed to you — you have to choose.
announce.chooseOrPush: Pick a mode, or pass to your partner.
announce.chooseOnly: Pick a mode. (Passing isn't possible in Solo Jass.)
announce.slalomDirectionPrompt: Your partner announced Slalom. You play the first card — choose whether it starts Top-down (Bock) or Bottom-up (Geiss).

deal.sliding: The deck slides to the cutter …

weli.youHaveWeli: ✨ You were dealt the WELI — you announce!

weisen.pointsAfterFirst: Points are awarded after the first game (the highest declaration wins for the whole team).
weisen.tapCardsPoints: Tap cards in your hand • {{points}} pts
weisen.tapHint: Tap the cards in your hand that you want to declare as a Weis.

reason.noPattern: Not a valid declaration (neither a sequence nor four of a kind)

result.title: Declarations (Weisen) result
result.teamWins: Team {{team}} has the highest declaration and takes {{points}} pts.
result.soloWins: {{name}} has the highest declaration and takes {{points}} pts.

void.sackBody: With only {{cardPoints}} card points (under 21) this whole round is voided — cards and Weis, {{lost}} points total. They go to nobody.
void.noTrickBody: Without a single trick this round, the declaration points ({{lost}}) are voided.

cut.title: Cut the deck
cut.explain: Slide to choose where to cut — or knock (don't cut).

disconnect.closedDefault: A majority voted to end the game.
disconnect.lostBody: {{names}} lost the connection to the server.
disconnect.grace1: We'll wait 2 minutes for a reconnect. If that doesn't work, a short vote begins.
disconnect.grace2: 1 more minute of waiting — maybe they'll be right back.

rematch.title: Game over
rematch.started: Everyone in — new round starts. (Table switches automatically to the new game.)
rematch.declined: Not everyone wants to continue. The table goes back to the waiting phase.

status.started: Next round starts. (Table switches automatically to the new game.)
status.declined: Not everyone wants to continue. The table goes back to the waiting phase.

opponent.handAndHidden: {{hand}} cards in hand · {{hidden}} face-down on the table

announce.title: It's your announcement — pick the mode

replay.title: Replay
replay.notPublicBody: This replay either does not exist, or the participants have not shared it yet.
replay.loginToSeeOwn: Sign in to see your own replays

error.incomplete: Replay: game is not finished yet ({{moves}}/36 moves).
error.initFailed: Replay: could not reconstruct the initial state — {{message}}
error.bodenseeNoDeal: This Bodensee game predates replay support — the full game state wasn't saved, so it can't be replayed. New Bodensee games can be replayed.

share.publicToggle: Publicly shareable — viewable via the share URL even without a login.
share.onlyParticipants: Only participants can share the replay.

player.initialState: Initial state — before the first move.

chat.composerPlaceholder: Message … (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a line break)
chat.dmBlockedHint: A chosen reception setting prevents a direct message from being sent here.

inference.title: AI inference
inference.ok: reachable — NN seats use the neural net.
inference.down: unreachable — NN seats play via the heuristic fallback.

system.intro: Operational status of this instance. Auto-refreshes every 15 seconds.
system.captchaOffNote: Captcha is off — only acceptable for private/LAN instances; do not expose publicly.

index.intro: Admin area. Tools for global settings, SMTP, user management, blocklist, chat word filter and audit log.

settings.title: Global settings
settings.desc: Max tables, max seats per variant, default points target.

smtp.title: SMTP settings
smtp.desc: Mail delivery configuration. The password is encrypted with AES-256-GCM.

blocklist.title: Blocklist
blocklist.desc: E-mail patterns and domains for the registration block.

bannedWords.title: Chat word filter
bannedWords.desc: Word list that gets replaced with *** in chat messages.

tables.title: Tables
tables.desc: Review active tables and dissolve them (moderation / cleanup).

system.title: System status
system.desc: DB, Redis, migrations, AI engine, mode and uptime at a glance.

quitters.title: Quitters
quitters.desc: Ranking by abandoned games — who leaves real opponents hanging?

quitters.intro: Ranking by abandoned games. "With humans" weighs more — bailing on AI tables is no big deal.

tables.intro: Active tables on the server. Orphaned ones (owner not seated) are flagged.

audit.prefixPlaceholder: Action prefix, e.g. auth. or admin.blocklist.

bannedWords.intro: Words that get replaced with *** in chat messages (lobby, game, DM). Substring match, case-insensitive. To block registrations see Blocklist — a different feature.
bannedWords.empty: No words configured — chat moderation is currently unfiltered.

settings.intro: Global settings for the lobby. Values apply from the next table — existing tables are not adjusted retroactively.
settings.maxOpenTablesHelp: Cap on WAITING + IN_GAME + POST_GAME. Protection against uncontrolled growth.
settings.maxSeatsHelp: Hard cap on seat count. Today: KREUZ_4P/SOLO_4P=4, BODENSEE_2P=2, KREUZ_6P=6 (planned). Default 6.
settings.defaultPointsHelp: Fallback when the table opener doesn't specify their own target.

smtp.heading: SMTP settings
smtp.saveSuccess: Saved. The next mail delivery uses the new settings.
smtp.hint: Note: the next mail delivery (verify, reset, …) automatically rebuilds the SMTP transporter. You can verify the new settings right away by, for example, triggering a password reset for a test user.
